name: Extreme Words
description: Look for limiting words like 'all', 'only', 'never', 'solely' that make a choice too restrictive.

name: Cause-Effect Confusion
description: Mistaking the result for the cause, or reversing the causal relationship specified in the text.

name: Reference Trap
description: Using a pronoun or detail incorrectly to refer to a noun that wasn't the original actor.

name: Detail vs Main Idea
description: Selecting a detail that is technically true but doesn't answer the main-idea question.

name: Tone Misread
description: Overstating the author's neutral explanation as highly critical or overly positive.

name: Reversal
description: Directly contradicting the facts in the passage, often using double negations or subtle antonyms.
